---
title: "PUM-seq"
site: workflowr::wflow_site
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---


[Project overview](overview.html)

[Pipeline](pipeline.html)

[Pipeline-testing: quality control for CL18870](qc_CL18870.html)

[Pipeline-testing: quality control for CL18909](qc_CL18909.html)

[Quality control using rRNA](qc_rRNA.html)
